commands.review_summary:
This PR changes MCP tool-result materialization to coerce non-text/image MCP ContentBlock variants into AgentToolResult text blocks and adds regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +66. Total +102 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main accepts MCP CallToolResult.content as AgentToolResult.content while the MCP SDK contract includes non-text/image blocks. I did not run a live MCP/Anthropic reproduction in this read-only review.
